'''Tarnith''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] along the [[Jebble-Vanquo-Tarnith line]]. A resource world for [[Taris/Legends|Taris]], it was threatened by the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]] in [[3966 BBY/Legends|3966 BBY]], which compelled [[Lhosan Industries]] to obtain a seat for Taris in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]].
